name: Bring Back My Girls
overview: Host Ts Madison brings back the casts of your favorite RuPaul’s Drag Race seasons in front of a live audience at DragCon LA. Queens from the US, UK, Canada, Holland and Down Under reunite to spill the tea on their seasons and update fans on where they are now! The queens face-off with their fans in a live Q&A, and Ts Madison asks all the questions - even the ones that fans are afraid to ask. There are laughs, fights, nostalgia, insider stories, tears, and even some never before heard confessions.

trailers.title: Bring Back My Girls presented by HOUSE OF LOVE – Official Trailer
